typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ExecutionBatchID as integer (),
	ExternalFactoryCode as integer (),
	MaxUID as integer (),
	ProfilSSIS as string (),
	RMData as string (),
	pDestination as string (),
	pExtFactoryCode as integer (),
	pSource as string (),
	pStage as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Code Raw Material} as string,
		{Description Raw Material} as string,
		{Incorporation Type} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: '/* SELECT DISTINCT q2.COMP_epu as "Code Raw Material", q1.[Description Raw Material], MAX(q1.[Incorporation Type]) as "Incorporation Type"  FROM [dbo].ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL q1 INNER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[Code Raw Material]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[Code Raw Material])) 			ELSE [Code Raw Material] END as COMP_epu,  			MAX([Code Raw Material]) as [Code Raw Material] FROM [dbo].[ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL] group by CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[Code Raw Material]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [Code Raw Material])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([Code Raw Material], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[Code Raw Material])) 			ELSE [Code Raw Material] END) q2 on q1.[Code Raw Material]=q2.[Code Raw Material] group by q2.COMP_epu, q1.[Description Raw Material] ORDER BY [Code Raw Material] */ SELECT DISTINCT q2.COMP_epu as "Code Raw Material", q1.[Description Raw Material], MAX(q1.[Incorporation Type]) as "Incorporation Type"  FROM [dbo].ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL q1 INNER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[COMP]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[COMP])) 			ELSE [COMP] END as COMP_epu,  			MAX([COMP]) as [Code Raw Material] FROM [dbo].[ARDM_FORMULA_RAW_MATERIAL] group by CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(\'.\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\'.\',[COMP]))             WHEN CHARINDEX(\',\', [COMP])>0 THEN SUBSTRING([COMP], 0, CHARINDEX(\',\',[COMP])) 			ELSE [COMP] END) q2 on q1.[COMP]=q2.[Code Raw Material] group by q2.COMP_epu, q1.[Description Raw Material] ORDER BY [Code Raw Material]',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SourceOLEDB	source(output(
		CodeRawMaterial as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT RTRIM(CodeRawMaterial) as CodeRawMaterial FROM RawMaterials',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> RechercheLKPTABLE
SourceOLEDB derive(UserName = $User__ProfilSSIS,
		{Incorporation Type} = iif(iif(iif(Incorporation_Type == '' || Incorporation_Type == '0', '3', Incorporation_Type == '1'), ' 3', Incorporation_Type == '3'), '1 ', '2')) ~> Colonnedrive
Colonnedrive derive(UserName = UserName) ~> PlaceHolderScriptComponent
PlaceHolderScriptComponent,RechercheLKPTABLE lookup(MD5RawMaterialCode == CodeRawMaterial,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Recherche
Recherche split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> RechercheIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
RechercheIsMatch@NotMatch derive(IncorporatedType_crit = Incorporation_Type) ~> Colonnedrive1
RechercheIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn()) ~> CommandeOLEDB1
Colonnedrive1 sink(input(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CommandeOLEDB
